scripts.kill:backend: bash -lc 'pids=$(lsof -ti tcp:8000 2>/dev/null || true); [ -n "$pids" ] && kill $pids || true; sleep 0.3; pids=$(lsof -ti tcp:8000 2>/dev/null || true); [ -n "$pids" ] && kill -9 $pids || true'
scripts.kill:frontend: bash -lc 'pids=$(lsof -ti tcp:5173,tcp:5174,tcp:5175 2>/dev/null || true); [ -n "$pids" ] && kill $pids || true; sleep 0.3; pids=$(lsof -ti tcp:5173,tcp:5174,tcp:5175 2>/dev/null || true); [ -n "$pids" ] && kill -9 $pids || true'
scripts.frontend: cd frontend && npm run dev -- --host localhost --port 5173
scripts.backend: bash -lc 'cd backend && if [ -f .env ]; then set -a; source .env; set +a; fi; ./.venv/bin/python -m uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload'
scripts.backend:local: bash -lc 'cd backend && if [ -f .env ]; then set -a; source .env; set +a; fi; ./.venv/bin/python -m uvicorn main:app --host localhost --port 8000 --reload'
scripts.full: bash -lc 'npm run kill:backend; npm run kill:frontend; trap "kill 0" INT TERM EXIT; npm run backend & npm run frontend & wait'
scripts.full:public: bash -lc 'npm run kill:backend; npm run kill:frontend; trap "kill 0" INT TERM EXIT; npm run backend & npm run frontend:public & wait'
